passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 4 people at $5 per person.
Ages 17 and under are free.
Online reservations are required.
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 people at $5 per person.
Ages 17 and under are free.
Online reservations are required.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 2 adults at $15 per person and 4 youths (ages 7-17) at $10 per person.
Ages 6 and under are free.
Pass can be presented on a hand held device, as a paper printout at the museum, or used to reserve general admission and special exhibit tickets online.
source_phrases: Admits up to 2 adults at $15 per person and 4 youths (ages 7-17) at $10 per person.
Ages 6 and under are free.
Pass can be presented on a hand held device, as a paper printout at the museum, or used to reserve general admission and special exhibit tickets online.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 4 people at 1/2 off regular admission for the museum’s exhibit halls.
Ages 2 and under are free.
Pass can be presented on a hand held device or as a paper printout at the museum.
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 people at 1/2 off regular admission for the museum’s exhibit halls.

Pass can be presented on a hand held device or as a paper printout at the museum.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 people at $20 per person.
Ages 2 and under are free.
Pass can be presented on a hand held device or as a paper printout at the museum.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 5 people at 1/2 off regular admission.
Ages 12 months and under are free.
Pass may be presented on a hand held device or as a paper printout at the museum.

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 2 people at $12 per person. Ages 16 and under are free.
Reservations are required.
source_phrases: Admits up to 2 people at $12 per person. Ages 16 and under are free.
Reservations are required.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 5 people for free admission.
Pass  can be presented on a hand held device or as a paper printout  at the museum.
source_phrases: Admits up to 5 people for free admission.
Pass  can be presented on a hand held device or as a paper printout  at the museum.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 4 people at 1/2 off regular admission.
Ages 1 year and under are free.
Pass can be presented on a hand held device or as a paper printout at the museum.
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 people at 1/2 off regular admission.
Ages 1 year and under are free.
Pass can be presented on a hand held device or as a paper printout at the museum.

passes.title: Wenham Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Available only at the main library.
Admits up to 6 people at $9 per adult.
Ages 2-12 at $6 per child.
Ages 1 year and under are free.
Valid during regular daytime hours.
Pass must be picked up at the library and presented at the zoo.
